user.description: Configure your Anytype API connection. You can generate an API key in the Anytype desktop app (Settings > API Keys) or use the programmatic authentication flow. Default host is http://localhost:31009 for local Anytype instances.

error.auth: Invalid API key. Please check your credentials.
error.connection: Unable to connect to Anytype. Make sure the Anytype app is running and accessible.

abort.already_configured: This Anytype instance is already configured.
